notes: The game started after using protontricks to reinstall dotNET 4.0. Fully playable campaign and multiplayer. Some textures (snow outside) are missing.
title: LOST PLANET® 3

notes: With Proton 4.2-3 you don't need to reinstall dotnet40 anymore. It works but some textures are still missing...
title: LOST PLANET® 3

notes: This game runs now - it used to crash! I see white everywhere (and does not look the same as the windows version) so there is graphics glitches. The game plays great though! Once you go underground the texture issues disappear - they look to be snow related.
title: LOST PLANET® 3

notes: Used d9vk 0.13. Without it some textures are completely white. During two hours experienced one hang up.
title: LOST PLANET® 3

notes: Adittion to previous report (I'll probably finish the game sometime with 4.11, which seems also play properly with d9vk enabled): The game runs nicely with d9vk. Experienced only once problems with textures. In scene middle of the game where thermal energy post overloads, I couldn't tell what happened, because screen turned partly white. No further hang ups. I'd suscpect the initial hang up resulted, because the game was being ran from ntfs partition. Ntfs additionally results very long loading times.
title: LOST PLANET® 3
